title: Portuguese Beef Cutlet Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful stir fry made with thinly cut beef cutlets, robust herbs, and a hint of portuguese spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef cutlets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked through.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the portuguese seasonings, robust herbs, and fry mix.
Return the beef cutlets to the skillet and stir to coat with the herb mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
